Sajin

Kerala, India
Software Professional

A gentle soul with a deep love for Carnatic music and Bharatanatyam. She brings warmth and grace to every room she enters, and has a beautiful gift for making everyone feel at home.

Groom

Keerthana

Groom Family
Kerala, India
Professional

An adventurous spirit who finds joy in the outdoors and captures the world through his camera lens. His warmth, laughter, and quiet strength make every moment feel special.

TravelPhotography
Our Story
"

They first met through mutual friends in 2021, bonding over shared stories, filter coffee, and a love for Kerala's serene backwaters. What began as a warm friendship slowly blossomed into something beautiful — a bond built on laughter, trust, and countless cherished memories.
